steps.title: Apply the triangle inequality on each pair
steps.content:
For sides $8$, $13$, and $x$, the sum of any two must exceed the third:
$$8 + 13 \gt x \Rightarrow x \lt 21$$
$$8 + x \gt 13 \Rightarrow x \gt 5$$
$$13 + x \gt 8 \Rightarrow x \gt -5 \text{ (auto-true since lengths are positive)}$$

steps.title: Combine the active constraints
steps.content:
$x \gt 5$ and $x \lt 21$ together give $5 \lt x \lt 21$.

That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
